title: Snowball on a Stick
description: Adds an item that increases the movement speed of Happy Ghasts.
body: # About Snowball on a Stick is a simple mod that adds a **Snowball on a Stick** item to boost Happy Ghasts. [](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) ## Features - The **Snowball on a Stick** item itself - 2x movement boost when on a Happy Ghast Just requires a **snowball** and a **fishing rod!** ![Crafting recipe for snowball on a stick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4184cb3fcea039f522a6885e3eae0b839683f779.png) ## Installation > **If installing on multiplayer, make sure it's downloaded on both client and server.** 1. Download the `.jar` file that corresponds to your minecraft version. 2. Place the mod file in your `mods` folder. ## TODO - ~~Balance it in a way that it's not too OP for survival~~ - ~~Change recipe to fishing rod + snowball~~ - ~~Add durability~~ - Port to other mod loaders ## Heads-up > _Created this mod for convenience. I will hopefully find the time to continue working on this mod after exams._
